description.es: Los Unicornios básicos no pueden entrar en ningún Establo que no sea el tuyo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Basic Unicorn cards cannot enter any player's Stable except yours.
Second Print: Basic Unicorn cards cannot enter any other player's Stable.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stables, no other player can play Basic Unicorns

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: DESTRUYE una carta de Unicornio.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: DESTROY a Unicorn card.
Original Text: DESTROY a Unicorn.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo cada jugador (también tú) debe SACRIFICAR una carta de Unicornio.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, each player (including you) must SACRIFICE a Unicorn card.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, each player must SACRIFICE a Unicorn card.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, each player must SACRIFICE a Unicorn.

description.es: ROBA 3 cartas y DESCARTA una carta.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: DRAW 3 cards and DISCARD a card.
Original Text: DRAW three cards, then DISCARD a card.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Baila como si estuvieras sola
description.en: Flavor Text: Dance like nobody's watching.

description.es: Esta carta no puede ser destruida por cartas de Magia.
description.en:
2nd Edition: This card cannot be destroyed by Magic cards.
Second Print: This card cannot be destroyed or otherwise affected by Magic Cards.
Original Text / First Print: As long as this card is in your Stable, it cannot be destroyed or affected by Magic Cards.

description.es: Si esta carta se encuentra en tu Establo al inicio de tu turno, SACRIFICA una carta de Unicornio y, a continuación, ROBA una carta.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, SACRIFICE a Unicorn card, then DRAW a card.
Original Text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, SACRIFICE a Unicorn, then DRAW an extra card.

description.es: DESTRUYE una carta de Ventaja o SACRIFICA una carta de Desventaja.
description.en:
2nd Edition: DESTROY an Upgrade card or SACRIFICE a Downgrade card.
Original Text: SACRIFICE or DESTROY an Upgrade or Downgrade card.

description.es: Intercambia todas las cartas de tu mano con las de otro jugador.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: Trade hands with any other player.
Original Text: Trade hands with any player.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes DESCARTAR una carta para, a continuación, HURTAR una carta de Unicornio.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may DISCARD a card, then STEAL a Unicorn card.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, STEAL a Unicorn card. If this card leaves your Stable, return that Unicorn card to the Stable from which you stole it.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may move a Unicorn from any player's Stable to your Stable. If this card leaves your Stable, move the Unicorn back to its original Stable.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: #nomakeup #nofilter #gafasdesol #sincomplejos #selfi #unicornio #TGIF #estaesmicrin
description.en: Flavor Text: #nomakeup #nofilter #sunnies #shameless #selfie #basic #TGIF # unicornhairdontcare

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes buscar una carta de Desventaja en el mazo de robo y ponerla en tu mano; a continuación, baraja el mazo de robo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your  Stable, you may  search  the  deck  for a  Downgrade card  and add it to your  hand, then  shuffle  the  deck.
Second Print: When this card enters your  Stable, you may  search  the  deck  for a  Downgrade card  and add it to your  hand. Shuffle  the  deck.
Original Text: When this card enters your  Stable, you may  search  the  deck  for a  Downgrade card  add it to your hand, then  shuffle  the  deck.

description.es: Puedes SACRIFICAR esta carta en lugar de destruir una carta de Unicornio en tu Establo.
description.en:
Second Edition: If a Unicorn card in your Stable would be destroyed, you may SACRIFICE this card instead.
Second Print: If 1 of your Unicorn cards would be destroyed, you may SACRIFICE this card instead.
Original Text: If one of your Unicorns would be destroyed, you may SACRIFICE this card instead.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada o destruida, devuélvela a tu mano.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, DRAW a card. If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, DRAW a card. If this card would be sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand instead.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, DRAW a card. If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entre en tu Establo, mira las 3 cartas superiores del mazo de robo, elige una y aňádela a tu mano. A continuación, devuelve las 2 cartas restantes a la parte superior del mazo de robo en el orden que desees.
description.en: 2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, look at the top 3 cards of the deck and add one of them to your hand, then return the other two to the top of the deck in any order.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Solo escucho discos de vinilo y cintas de casete.
description.en: Flavor Text: Vinyl records and mixtapes only.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes buscar una carta que contenga la palabra Narval en su título y ponerla en tu mano; a continuación, baraja el mazo de robo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may search the deck for a card with "Narwhal" in its name and add it to your hand, then shuffle the deck.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may search the deck for a card with "Narwhal" in its name and add it to your hand. Shuffle the deck.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may search the deck for a card with "Narwhal" in its name. Add it to your hand, then shuffle the deck.

description.es: Si esta carta se encuentra en tu Establo al inicio de tu turno, puedes SACRIFICAR una carta para, a continuación, DESTRUIR una carta.
description.en:
2nd Edition: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may SACRIFICE a card, then DESTROY a card.
Second Print: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may SACRIFICE a card. If you do, DESTROY a card.
Original Text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may SACRIFICE a card, then DESTROY a card.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo también puedes poner una carta de Unicornio básico de tu mano en tu Establo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may bring a Basic Unicorn card from your hand into your Stable.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may bring a Basic Unicorn card from your hand directly into your Stable.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may also bring a Basic Unicorn directly into your Stable from your hand.

description.es: DESCARTA una carta cada vez que una carta de Unicornio entra en tu Establo o abandona tu Establo.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: Each time a Unicorn card enters or leaves your Stable, DISCARD a card.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stable, you must DISCARD a card each time a Unicorn enters or leaves your Stable.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes SACRIFICAR una carta de Unicornio para, a continuación, buscar una carta de Unicornio en la pila de descartes y ponerla en tu Establo.
description.en: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes SACRIFICAR una carta de Unicornio para, a continuación, buscar una carta de Unicornio en la pila de descartes y ponerla en tu Establo.

description.es: Esta carta cuenta como 2 cartas de Unicornio. No puedes jugar carta Relincho de ningún tipo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: This card counts for 2 Unicorns. You cannot play any Neigh cards.
Second Print: This card counts for 2 Unicorns. You cannot play any Instant cards.
Original Text: This card counts for two Unicorns in your Stable. As long as this card is in your Stable, you cannot play any instant cards.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes buscar una carta de Ventaja en el mazo de robo y ponerla en tu mano; a continuación, baraja el mazo de robo.
description.en:
Second Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may search the deck for an Upgrade card and add it to your hand, then shuffle the deck.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may search the deck for an Upgrade card and add it to your hand. Shuffle the deck.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may search the deck for an Upgrade card. Add it to your hand, then shuffle the deck.

description.es: No puedes jugar cartas Relincho.
description.en:
2nd Edition: You cannot play Neigh cards.
Second Print: You cannot play Instant cards.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stable, you cannot play Instant cards.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo también puedes DESCARTAR 2 cartas de Unicornio para, a continuación, poner una carta de Unicornio de la pila de descartes en tu Establo.
description.en: 2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may DISCARD 2 Unicorn cards, then bring a Unicorn card from the discard pile into your Stable.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entre en tu Establo, ROBA 2 cartas y DESCARTA una carta.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, DRAW 2 cards and DISCARD a card.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, DRAW two cards then DISCARD a card.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entre en tu Establo, SACRIFICA todas las cartas de Desventaja que tengas en tu Establo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, SACRIFICE all Downgrade cards in your Stable.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, SACRIFICE all Downgrade cards.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, SACRIFICE all Downgrade cards in your Stable.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Juega esta carta cuando otro jugador intente jugar una carta. Ese jugador no podrá jugar su carta y deberá dejarla en la pila de descartes.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Play this card when another player tries to play a card. Stop their card from being played and send it to the discard pile.
Second Print: Play this card when any other player tries to play a card. Stop that player's card from being played and send it to the discard pile.
Original Text: Play this card when any playertries to play a card. Stop that player's card from coming into play and send it to the discard pile instead.

description.es: Todas tus cartas de Unicornio son ahora cartas de Unicornio Básico sin efectos.
description.en:
2nd Edition: All of your Unicorn cards are considered Basic Unicorns with no effects.
Second Print: Triggered effects of your Unicorn cards do not activate.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stable, your Unicorn card effects cannot be activated.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Tus cartas de Unicornio no pueden ser destruidas.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: Your Unicorn cards cannot be destroyed.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stable, your Unicorns cannot be destroyed.

description.es: Las barbas están súper en tendencia.
description.en: Flavor Text: Beards are like, so hot.

description.es:
2da Edición: Tu mano debe ser visible para todos los jugadores.
Segunda impresión: tu mano debe estar visible para todos los jugadores en todo momento.
Texto original: Mientras esta carta esté en tu establo, debes jugar con tu mano visible para todos los jugadores.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Your hand must be visible to all players.
Second Print: Your hand must be visible to all player at all times.
Original Text: As long as this card if in your Stable, you must play with your hand visible to all players.

description.es: Cuando esta entra en tu Establo también puedes poner un Bebé unicornio de la Guardería en tu Establo.
description.en: 2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may bring a Baby Unicorn card from the Nursery into your Stable.

description.es: Si esta carta se encuentra en tu Establo al inicio de tu turno, puedes DESCARTAR 2 cartas para, a continuación, DESTRUIR una carta de Unicornio.
description.en: 2nd Edition: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DISCARD 2 cards, then DESTROY a Unicorn card.

description.es: Todos los jugadores (también tú) deben SACRIFICAR todas las cartas de Ventaja y de Desventaja que tengan en su Establo. Pon en el mazo de robo las cartas de la pila de descartes y baraja el mazo de robo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Each player (including you) must SACRIFICE all Upgrade and Downgrade cards in their Stable. Shuffle the discard pile into the deck.
Second Print: Each player must SACRIFICE all Upgrade and Downgrade cards. Shuffle the discard pile into the deck.
Original Text: Each player must SACRIFICE all of their Upgrade and Downgrade cards. Shuffle the discard pile back into the deck.

description.es: Si esta carta se encuentra en tu Establo al inicio de tu turno, puedes SACRIFICAR una carta para, a continuación, ROBAR 2 cartas.
description.en: 2nd Edition: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may SACRIFICE a card, then DRAW 2 cards.

description.es: Si esta carta se encuentra en tu Establo al inicio de tu turno, puedes DESCARTAR 3 cartas para, a continuación, HURTAR una carta de Unicornio.
description.en: 2nd Edition: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DISCARD 3 cards, then STEAL a Unicorn card.

description.es: Busca una carta de Unicornio en la pila de descartes y ponla en tu Establo.
description.en: Second Edition: Bring a Unicorn card from the discard pile into your Stable.

description.es: Nadie puede anular tus cartas.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Cards you play cannot be Neigh'd.
First Print / Second Print: Cards you play cannot be Neigh'd.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stable, cards you play cannot be Neigh'd.

description.es: Mira las cartas que tenga otro jugador en su mano. Elige una carta y quédatela.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Look at another player's hand. Choose a card and add it to your hand.
Second Print: Choose any player and look at that player's hand. Choose a card from that player's hand and add it to your hand.
Original Text: Look at any player's hand. Take a card of your choice and add it to your hand.

description.es: Si en algún momento tienes más de 5 Unicornios en tu Establo, SACRIFICA una carta de Unicornio.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: If at any time you have more than 5 Unicorns in your Stable, SACRIFICE a Unicorn card.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stable, you can only have five Unicorns in your Stable.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes DESTRUIR una carta de Ventaja o SACRIFICAR una carta de Desventaja.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may DESTROY an Upgrade card or SACRIFICE a Downgrade card.
Original Text/Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may SACRIFICE or DESTROY an Upgrade or Downgrade card.

description.es: ROBA 2 cartas y DESCARTA 3 cartas para, a continuación, jugar otro turno.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: DRAW 2 cards and DISCARD 3 cards, then take another turn.
Original Text: DRAW two cards, DISCARD three cards, then take another turn.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada o destruida, puedes DESTRUIR una carta de Unicornio.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, you may DESTROY a Unicorn card.
Original Text: If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, you may DESTROY a Unicorn.

description.es: No puedes jugar cartas de Ventaja.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: You cannot play Upgrade cards.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stable, you cannot play Upgrade cards.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Esta carta no tiene poderes especiales, pero ¡es tan mona...!
description.en: Flavor Text: This card has no special powers, but it sure is cute!

description.es: Carta da Unicornio Básico
description.en: Flavor Text: 💖🙌💅🙌💖💁💁😂😂😂

description.es: Cuadno esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes quitar una carta al azar de la mano de otro jugador.
description.en:
Second Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may pull a card at random from another player's hand.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, choose any player. Pull a card from that player's hand.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may take a card at random from any player's hand and add it to your hand.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada o destruida, devuélvela a tu mano.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may add a Magic card from the discard pile to your hand.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose a Magic card from the discard pile and add it to your hand. If this card would be sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand instead.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose a Magic card from the discard pile and add it to your hand. If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.

description.es:
Segunda impresión / 2.ª edición: SACRIFICAR una carta y luego DESTRUIR 2 cartas.
Texto original: SACRIFICAR una carta, luego DESTRUIR dos cartas.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: SACRIFICE a card, then DESTROY 2 cards.
Original Text: SACRIFICE a card, then DESTROY two cards.

description.es: Los cuellos alzados son solo para las citas.
description.en: Flavor Text: Popped collars are for date nights only.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Lista de referencias de reglas.
description.en: Rule reference list.

description.es: Devuelve una carta que se encuentre en el Establo de otro jugador a su mano. Ese jugador debe DESCARTAR una carta.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Return a card in another player's Stable to their hand. That player must DISCARD a card.
Second Print: Choose any player. Return a card in that player's Stable to their hand. That player must DISCARD a card.
Original Text: Return a card in any player's Stable to that player's hand. That player must then DISCARD a card.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Cada jugador (también tú) devuelve a su mano una carta que se encuentre en su Establo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Return a card in each player's Stable (including yours) to their hand.
Original Text: Return a card in each player's Stable to that player's hand.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes HURTAR una carta de Ventaja.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may STEAL an Upgrade card.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may move an Upgrade card from any player's Stable to your Stable.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada o destruida, devuélvela a tu mano.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may add a Neigh card from the discard pile to your hand.If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose an Instant card from the discard pile and add it to your hand. If this card would be sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand instead.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose an Instant card from the discard pile and add it to your hand. If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.

description.es: Cada jugador (también tú) debe DESCARTAR una carta. Despueés pon en el mazo de robo las cartas de la pila de descartes y baraja el mazo de robo.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Each player (including you) must DISCARD a card. Shuffle the discard pile into the deck.
Second Print: Each player must DISCARD a card. Shuffle the discard pile into the deck.
Original Text: Each player must DISCARD  a card. Shuffle the discard pile back into the deck.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada o destruida, devuélvela a tu mano.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may force another player to DISCARD a card.If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose any player. That player must DISCARD a card. If this card would be sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand instead.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose a player. That player must DISCARD a card. If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.

description.es: es la esencia de la vida.
description.en: Flavor Text: Pumpkin spice is the pumpkin spice of life.

description.es: Juega esta carta cuando otro jugador intente jugar una carta. Ese jugador no podrá jugar su carta y deberá dejarla en la pila de descartes. Esta carta no puede anularse.
description.en:
2nd Edition: Play this card when another player tries to play a card. Stop their card from being played and send it to the discard pile. This card cannot be Neigh'd.
Second Print: Play this card when any other player tries to play a card. Stop that player's card from being played and send it to the discard pile. This card cannot be Neigh'd.
Original Text: Play this card when any player tries to play a card. Stop that player's card from coming into play and send it to the discard pile instead. This card cannot be Neigh'd

description.es: Si esta carta se encuentra en tu Establo al inicio de tu turno, puedes DESCARTAR una carta para, a continuación, ROBAR una carta.
description.en: 2nd Edition: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DISCARD a card, then DRAW a card.

description.es: Mueve una carta de Unicornio de tu Establo a otro para, continuación, HURTAR una carta de Unicornio de ese último Establo.
description.en:
2nd Edition / Second Print: Move a Unicorn card in your Stable to any other player's Stable, then STEAL a Unicorn card from that player's Stable.
Original Text: Trade a Unicorn in your Stable for a Unicorn in any player's Stable.

description.es: Mueve una carta de Ventaja o de Desventaja de un Establo a otro.
description.en:
Second Print / Second Edition: Move an Upgrade or Downgrade card from any player's Stable to any other player's Stable.
Original Text: Move an Upgrade or Downgrade card from any player's Stable to another player's Stable.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo puedes SACRIFICARLA para, a continuación, DESTRUIR un carta de Unicornio.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may SACRIFICE this card, then DESTROY a Unicorn card.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may SACRIFICE this card. If you do, DESTROY a Unicorn card.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may DESTROY a Unicorn. If you do, SACRIFICE this card.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada o destruida, puedes DESCARTAR una carta en su lugar.
description.en:
2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed or destroyed, you may DISCARD a card instead.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, DISCARD a card. If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, bring it directly back into your Stable if you have at least 1 card in your hand.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, DISCARD a card. If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, bring it directly back into your Stable. If you are unable to DISCARD a card, this card is destroyed.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entre en tu Establo, devuelve una carta que se encuentre en el Establo de otro jugador a su mano.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, return a card in another player's Stable to their hand.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose any player. Return a card in that player's Stable to their hand.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may return a card in any player's Stable to that player's hand.

description.es: Pon en el mazo de robo esta carta, las cartas de tu mano y las cartas de la pila de descartes y baraja el mazo de robo. ROBA 5 cartas.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: Shuffle this card, your hand, and the discard pile into the deck. DRAW 5 cards.
Original Text: Shuffle this card, your hand, and the discard pile back into the deck, then DRAW five cards.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Todos tus Unicornios son ahora Pandas. Las cartas que afectan a los Unicornios no afectan a tus Pandas.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: All of your Unicorns are considered Pandas. Cards that affect Unicorn cards do not affect your Pandas.
Original Text: As long as this card is in your Stable, all of your Unicorns are considered Pandas and NOT Unicorns. Cards that affect Unicorns do not affect Pandas.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada o destruida, devuélvela a tu mano.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, you may add a Unicorn card from the discard pile to your hand.If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.
Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose a Unicorn card from the discard pile and add it to your hand. If this card would be sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand instead.
Original Text: When this card enters your Stable, you may choose a Unicorn from the discard pile and add it to your hand. If this card is sacrificed or destroyed, return it to your hand.

description.es: Cuando esta carta entra en tu Establo cada jugador (también tú) debe DESCARTAR una carta.
description.en:
2nd Edition: When this card enters your Stable, each player (including you) must DISCARD a card.
Original Text/First Print/Second Print: When this card enters your Stable, each player must DISCARD a card. Shuffle the discard pile back into the deck.

description.es: Si esta carta se encuentra en tu Establo al inicio de tu turno, puedes jugar 2 cartas durante tu Fase de Acción.
description.en:
Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may play 2 cards during your Action phase.
Original Text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may play two cards during your turn instead of one.

description.es: Si esta carta es sacrificada, destruida o devuelta a tu mano, déjala en la Guardería.
description.en: Original Text / First Print / Second Print / 2nd Edition: If this card would be sacrificed, destroyed, or returned to your hand, return it to the Nursery instead.

description.es: Si esta carta se encuentra en tu Establo al inicio de tu turno, puedes DESTRUIR una carta de Unicornio. Si lo haces, tu turno termina de inmediato.
description.en:
2nd Edition: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DESTROY a Unicorn card. If you do, immediately end your turn.
Second Print: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DESTROY a Unicorn, then end your turn immediately.
Original Text: If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DESTROY a Unicorn card. If you do, immediately skip to your End of Turn phase.
